title: Ultimate Roleplay Kit - Resourcepack
description: The core resourcepack that all of the Ultimate Roleplay Kit datapacks depend on
body:
# About
This is a dependency resourcepack, that all of my other Ultimate Roleplay Kit (URK) datapacks utilize, it does not affect the game in any way by itself. 

If you want to use any of the URK datapacks, you must also install & enable this resourcepack. 

Having one centralized dependency resourcepack is a lot more convinient, especially for server enviroments, because you don't have to install a unique resourcepack for each datapack separately, which comes at the cost of a bit more disk space taken by unused models,unless you're running all of the URK datapacks.

## Installation
- First of all, download the resourcepack version compatible with the URK datapacks you're gonna use (This is written in datapack changelogs). After that, drag the downloaded resourcepack into your ```.minecraft/resourcepacks``` folder, and then enable it via the in-game menu.

## All URK Packs:
### Mandatory Resourcepack:
- **Ultimate roleplay kit - Resourcepack** - A mandatory dependency resourcepack, utilized by all other Datapacks.

### Content Datapcks:
- [Ultimate roleplay kit - Hats](https://modrinth.com/project/ultimate-roleplay-kit) - Adds 36 cosmetic hats, that are sold by the wandering trader. 
- [Ultimate roleaply kit - Mail](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ultimate-roleplay-kit-mail) - Adds 36 postel item designs, that can also be customised further with 11 unique seals.
